response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in C++ and SQL (low-latency apps with D, C/C++ components for LabWindows/CVI, and SQL usage in multiple roles), but his recent work is heavily skewed toward TypeScript/Node.js and other languages/frameworks (Stripe, Shopify). He lacks demonstrated domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking, and his recent projects are not aligned with the financial-services domain. His C++ experience is primarily on Linux/embedded systems rather than Windows, which is a key requirement.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (5+ years, including low-latency systems and LabWindows/CVI)
Proficient in SQL (MongoDB, MySQL, and SQL Server/Oracle exposure)
Demonstrated expertise in software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring, and performance optimization)
concerns: No clear domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking
Recent work heavily focused on TypeScript/Node.js, deviating from the C++/Windows focus required
Limited Windows-specific C++ development in recent roles (prior work was D, Java, or Node.js)
